item.name: Files
Factset Returns the Jobid

request.name: Factset Returns the Jobid

description.content: Give the startDate and endDate parameters as request parameters in the /request-files endpoint, it returns the jobID. startDate and endDate should be in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format. This API only supports adhoc requests to retrieve historical files and does not support real-time files and if you interested in require real-time push should consider the other three methods (pushed via SFTP, to QNT account, or your Azure Storage). Per API request able to query till 2 years of data

query.description: (Required) Date from which data is required. Should be YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format
(Required) The date until which the data is to be fetched. Should be YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format

item.name: Factset Retrieve All Streetaccount Filters

request.name: Factset Retrieve All Streetaccount Filters

description.content: Add StreetAccount filters (watchlists, company filters, market topics, regions and sectors) to filter down StreetAccount headlines by the relevant categories. Set the structured and/or flattened flag. If structured flag is set, parent and child filter information will be returned. If flattened flag is set, flattened filters will be returned which can be used with the headlines and createView endpoints. Both flags can be set to return both sets of filters.  If no params are provided it will return both

query.description: Pass structured to generate a structured view of the available filters.
Pass flattened to generate a structured view of the available filters.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
